qa_pairs.question: When managing access for a shared collection in the Alliance Globus portal, what options are available for specifying the shared path and inviting users, and how can write permissions be granted?
qa_pairs.answer: When managing access for a shared collection in the Alliance Globus portal, you can specify the path relative to the share; use `/` for the entire collection or a path like `/Subdir-01/` for a specific subdirectory. Users can be invited via email (recommended if the Globus username is unknown or for those without an account), by their Globus username (for existing accounts), or by adding an entire Globus group (searching by group name or UUID). To grant write permissions, click the 'write' checkbox in the permission form; read access cannot be removed. Write permissions can also be added or removed from the access list by clicking the checkbox next to the user's name under the 'WRITE' column.

qa_pairs.question: What are the key security considerations and best practices recommended when sharing files through Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: When sharing files via Globus, it is crucial to ensure you have the data owner's permission. Verify recipients carefully, ideally using their email address, as Globus usernames are not linked to Alliance usernames. If sharing with a group you do not control, ensure you trust the group owner, as they may add unauthorized users. If granting write access, make sure you have backups of important files not on the shared endpoint, as users can delete or overwrite data. It is highly recommended that sharing be restricted to a subdirectory rather than your top-level home directory.

qa_pairs.question: What is the process for removing a shared collection within the Alliance Globus portal?
qa_pairs.answer: To remove a shared collection in the Alliance Globus portal, first click on 'Collections' on the left side of the screen, then navigate to the 'Shareable by You' tab. Next, click on the title of the 'Shared Collection' you want to remove. Finally, click the 'Delete Collection' button on the right side of the screen and confirm the deletion by clicking the red button. This action will delete the collection, but your files will not be affected, nor will any files others may have uploaded.
